---
title: "Magenta Book Chapter Map"
description: "Reading map for selected Magenta Book notes."
book_id: "magenta-book"
collection_id: "evaluation-texts"
note_type: "Map"
citation_key: "hm_treasury_evaluation_task_force_2020_magenta_book"
evidence_ids:
  - "chunk:magenta-book:magenta-book-executive-summary:c0003"
  - "chunk:magenta-book:magenta-book-3-evaluation-methods:c0002"
  - "chunk:magenta-book:magenta-book-5-managing-an-evaluation:c0017"
source_status: "needs_review"
---
## Source

This map uses selected MCP research-library sections from *Magenta Book: Central Government guidance on evaluation* [@hm_treasury_evaluation_task_force_2020_magenta_book].

## Reading Route

1. [Executive Summary and Evaluation Types](section-01-executive-summary.qmd) - pages 3; `Executive summary`
2. [Choosing Evaluation Methods](section-02-evaluation-methods.qmd) - pages 6; `3. Evaluation methods`
3. [Managing an Evaluation](section-03-managing-evaluation.qmd) - pages 8; `5. Managing an evaluation`

## How to Use This Map

- Start with the first section for the book's framing logic.
- Use the middle section to inspect the main design or method implications.
- Use the final section to check limits, quality standards, or implications for use.

## References
